content_body:
The weekend was an amazing experience! Our church, Discover Lite Church in Atlanta, GA hosted our first annual marriage retreat and the cabin was too much for words! The beauty of the craftsmanship, views and the overall spirit in this cabin and surrounding cabins is fantastic! thank you for sharing a piece of your life with our congregation and may the lord shine brightly on your home and family.

With Christ’s love Eric & Melinda
title: The weekend was an amazing experience!
